name: Christmas Fruitcake Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the oil and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the egg, then blend in the remaining ingredients until just combined.
3. Scoop dough by spoonfuls onto a lightly oiled baking sheet.
4. Bake at 350°F for about 10 minutes.
5. Cool on a wire rack before storing in a tightly closed container.
